items.title: Apple’s new Studio displays come with Thunderbolt 5
items.content: The new displays come with better cameras, new sound systems, and Thunderbolt 5 ports.

items.title: Apple unveils M5 Pro and M5 Max chips with new ‘Fusion Architecture’
items.content: The chips are engineered around Apple's new Fusion Architecture, an advanced design that merges two dies into a single, high-performance system on a chip (SoC).

items.title: Apple speeds up the iPad Air with an M4 upgrade, starting at $599
items.content: Apple refreshes the iPad Air with the M4 chip and more memory to make it better for AI use cases.

items.title: Apple bakes in AI smarts into its new $599 iPhone 17e
items.content: The base model comes with 256 GB of storage, which Apple says is twice the entry storage from the previous generation at the same starting price.

items.title: The billion-dollar infrastructure deals powering the AI boom
items.content: Here's everything we know about the biggest AI infrastructure projects, including major spending from Meta, Oracle, Microsoft, Google, and OpenAI.

items.title: The White House wants AI companies to cover rate hikes. Most have already said they would.
items.content: Many hyperscalers have already made public commitments to cover electricity cost increases.

items.title: The public opposition to AI infrastructure is heating up
items.content: Public backlash over the data center boom is leading to a variety of draconian policies — including bans on new construction.

items.title: All the important news from the ongoing India AI Impact Summit
items.content: India is hosting a four-day AI Summit this week that will be attended by executives from major AI labs and Big Tech, including OpenAI, Anthropic, Nvidia, Microsoft, Google, an

items.title: Oil and Natural Gas Prices Extend Rally as Iran Attacks Escalates
items.content: Energy prices continued to rise on Tuesday as attacks by the United States and Israel on Iran intensified, along with the country’s response.

items.title: Has Your Business Been Affected by Immigration Policies? We Want to Hear From You.
items.content: The New York Times is looking to talk to business owners whose work forces are changing because of immigration policies.

items.title: Trump’s ‘Whatever It Takes’ Rattles Global Markets
items.content: President Trump has signaled that he is open to the idea of a prolonged military conflict with Iran. Investors are spooked by that scenario.

items.title: Tariffs Confound Small Businesses Again
items.content: Chocolate makers and fig-paste importers are facing a tangle of unknowns, including whether to seek refunds for tariffs invalidated by the Supreme Court.
